spots.description: Mountain Mountain Pass is a beautiful trekking spot destination in Himachal Pradesh, situated approximately 257km from Shimla. It offers visitors a wonderful experience of the region's natural and cultural heritage, making it a must-visit location in North India.
spots.travel_information: Best time to visit: September to November. Accessible by road and train from Shimla. Entry fee: ₹250. Local guides available on site.
